title: God the Lord Is Known in Judah

verses.text: You are more majestic, glorious, than the mountains full of prey. You have spoiled the valient-hearted; wrapped in sleep of death are they. Men of war, whose hands are useless, cannot stand amidst the fray. Trinity Psalter, 2000 alt.

When from heav’n you uttered judgment, all the earth in fear stood still, While to save the poor and humble God in judgment worked his will. E’en the wrath of man shall praise you; You shall wear it like a belt. Trinity Psalter, 2000 alt.

Give the LORD your God your promise, keeping all your vows sincere. Come, let all around bring off’rings unto him who is revered; he cuts off the pride of princes, he by kings of earth is feared. Trinity Psalter, 2000 alt.
